name: Christopher Columbus Reaches the Americas
summary: Christopher Columbus landed in the Bahamas during his first voyage, marking the beginning of sustained European contact with the Americas.

name: Fall of Granada
summary: The Catholic Monarchs Ferdinand and Isabella captured Granada, ending Muslim rule in Spain and completing the Reconquista.

name: Alhambra Decree Issued
summary: The Alhambra Decree ordered the expulsion of Jews from Spain unless they converted to Christianity, significantly impacting Jewish communities across Europe and the Mediterranean.

name: Martin Behaim Creates the Erdapfel Globe
summary: Martin Behaim constructed the Erdapfel, the oldest surviving terrestrial globe, representing the known world before the discovery of the Americas.

name: Peace Treaty of Étaples
summary: France and England signed the Treaty of Étaples, ending hostilities between the two kingdoms and stabilizing relations after years of conflict.

name: Songhai Empire Expansion Under Askia Muhammad
summary: The Songhai Empire continued expanding in West Africa, strengthening its political and economic power under emerging leadership.
